generated_files.probe: PHP reflection verifies the first parameter is passed by reference and PHP execution verifies the argument is mutated through the generated shell.

claims: The WPHX PHP emitter now honors @:wp.byRef on emitted function, static-method, constructor, and instance-method parameters.
The by-reference driver emits an original-path PHP function with &$value and preserves the default value of the neighboring non-reference parameter.
The generated shell passes PHP lint, PHP reflection ABI checks, mutation behavior checks, and emission-manifest checks with no unsupported constructs.
non_claims: This does not claim by-reference return support.
This does not claim native PHP array mutation semantics for WP_Http::buildCookieHeader yet.
processHeaders, buildCookieHeader, header/cookie side effects, installed WordPress behavior, and whole-file WP_Http ownership remain future gates.
